artifact: Irene Pass-1 lesson plan + slide briefs
part: C1M1 Part 1 — The Call: Setting the Stage & Chapter 1
pass: Pass-1 (pre-Gary): lesson plan, Gary-ready slide briefs, de-dupe recommendation, special-format handling, clustering appendix (deferred). Narration = 1-line anchors only; full narration is Pass-2.
deck_target: Narrated Gamma deck (CLASSIC mode, A/B per-card) -> Descript

los.LO1: Define 'innovation mindset' + correlate clinical competencies to innovation frameworks (Design Thinking). (Understand/Apply)
los.LO2: Analyze macro/structural trends (admin burnout, healthcare consumerism, technological acceleration) necessitating intrapreneurial physician leadership. (Analyze)
los.LO3: Differentiate 'idea' vs 'opportunity' using Sandra Lam's Intrapreneurship Formula. (Analyze/Evaluate)
los.LO4: Evaluate systemic operational failures via root-cause analysis defended in a peer-reviewed forum ('M&M of Innovation'). (Evaluate)
los.LO5: Create a personal innovation baseline (SWOT) + 'Opportunity Radar'. (Create)

s01.note: LO1 primary (keystone innovation-mindset definition); LO2 seeded (tech acceleration, system complexity, burnout via NAM 2019)

s02.note: WEAKEST content-LO tie — program/expectation orientation, not a content objective; flagged honestly, not forced

s03.note: 5 physician-innovator exemplars; correlates clinical competence to innovation frameworks/types

s05.note: Defines Innovation+Intrapreneurship; seeds LO3/LO4 (Systemic Friction, Root Cause vs Symptom) for later Parts

s09.note: Recap; forward-points to LO2/LO3 (Part 2 problem diagnosis)

LO1.status: FULLY SERVED — this is Part 1's core objective

LO2.status: PARTIALLY SEEDED — full macro-trend Analyze is downstream-Part material

LO3.status: NOT SERVED in Part 1 — downstream-Part objective (Sandra Lam Intrapreneurship Formula); seeded only via Lexicon terms; forward-pointed by s09

LO4.status: NOT SERVED in Part 1 — downstream-Part objective (M&M of Innovation, root-cause defense)

LO5.status: NOT SERVED in Part 1 — downstream-Part objective (SWOT, Opportunity Radar)

lo_coverage.unserved_los_interpretation: EXPECTED, NOT A DEFECT. Part 1 is the opening framing of a multi-part module; it lands LO1 in full and seeds LO2. LO3/LO4/LO5 are served in later Parts; Slide 9 explicitly forward-points to them. No slide is unmapped; no Part-1 LO is left unserved.

sequencing.verdict: Keep SME source order 1->9. No reorder performed.
sequencing.observation_non_blocking: Lexicon (s05) follows the frameworks (s04) and exemplars (s03) rather than preceding them; SME uses a valid motivation-first sequence and the Lexicon functions as a returnable reference anchor, so placement is fine. Flagged for transparency only; no sequencing problem rises to the reorder bar.

dedupe_recommendation.summary: KEEP BOTH, DIFFERENTIATE BY FRAMING + CROSS-REFERENCE, RELOCATE First Principles. Slide 4 = the two scholarly-attributed contracted frameworks its narration names (Growth Mindset/Dweck, Psychological Safety/Edmondson); Slide 5 Lexicon = the broader 8-term operational reference. (a) First Principles (identical wording) -> remove from Slide 4, keep only on Lexicon (aligns with narration + newer rendering; zero content lost). (b) Psychological Safety + Growth Mindset (different wording) -> keep both as deliberate cross-register reinforcement; cross-reference Lexicon entries to Slide 4's formal defs. Operator confirms before Gary renders.
dedupe_recommendation.content_dropped: none — First Principles is relocated verbatim, not deleted; wording unchanged in the move

operator_review_decision_items.item: Lexicon (s05) <-> Slide 4 (s04) de-dupe: keep both + differentiate framing + cross-reference + relocate First Principles to Lexicon-only. Confirm.

Slide 1 'Welcome Video (Talking Head + B-Roll)' -> render as a NARRATED welcome card this run; talking-head video production deferred (storyboard + video prompt carried as future-pass metadata). Confirm.
Slide 7 embedded YouTube (Epstein) -> embed/link as focal card asset framed by pre/post narration beats; confirm Gamma+Descript embed behavior (inline-play vs click vs dedicated Descript segment).

Slide 3 WHO Surgical Safety Checklist PDF is an UNRESOLVED Notion attachment -> ship Slide 3 with resolvable citations only (ACEP, PMC4106555, PMC3960713); Gary must not invent/substitute. Confirm ship-without or supply asset.

informational_flags_non_blocking: Slide 2 has the weakest content-LO tie (program orientation); kept, not force-mapped.
LO3/LO4/LO5 not served in Part 1 — downstream-Part objectives, expected.
Sequencing: Lexicon placement observation only, no reorder.
Slides 6 & 8 are source-labeled 'Design Brief' visual-metaphor units; their split-screen metaphor is the instructional payload; render as single indivisible visuals (no operator decision required).

fabrication_attestation: All on-card bodies, exemplar descriptions, definitions, citations, and visual directions are faithful to the LOCKED source slides at the cited provenance. SME prose was condensed into card-appropriate bullets WITHOUT adding facts, changing figures, or dropping citations: the keystone innovation-mindset definition (s01), the 5 exemplars + their references (s03), the Dweck/Edmondson attributions (s04), the 8 Lexicon terms (s05), the required verbatim split-screen text labels (s06/s08), the Epstein YouTube link (s07), and the 4 verbatim summary bullets (s09) are all preserved. Narration is intentionally NOT authored here — only 1-line anchors capturing the spoken thrust (full narration = Pass-2). The ONLY structural change vs. raw source is a RECOMMENDED, operator-gated de-dupe relocation of the 'First Principles Thinking' definition from Slide 4 to the Slide 5 Lexicon (its wording unchanged, present on both in source) — flagged as Decision Item 1, not silently applied. The unresolved WHO Surgical Safety Checklist PDF was carried as a flagged-unresolved reference, NOT invented or substituted. LO mapping uses only the authoritative 5-LO set; no LO was invented, and unserved LOs (LO3/4/5) are reported as out-of-Part-1-scope rather than force-fitted.
